# Probo

> Probo is a compliance automation platform.
> It helps companies achieve and maintain security and compliance standards (such as SOC 2, ISO 27001, and GDPR) through structured workflows, automated evidence collection, and hands-on guidance.
> With Probo, companies move through the compliance process faster, with clarity, and without disrupting their core operations.

## Core Documentation

- [Homepage](https://getprobo.com)
- [Documentation](https://getprobo.com/docs)
- [Blog](https://getprobo.com/blog)
- [Customer Stories](https://getprobo.com/stories)

## Blog / Thought Leadership

- [What is SOC 2 and how to be compliant?](https://www.getprobo.com/blog/2025-10-28-what-is-soc2)
- [What is hands off compliance?](https://www.getprobo.com/blog/2025-10-17-what-is-hands-off-compliance)
- [What is the cost of SOC 2?](https://www.getprobo.com/blog/2025-03-04-what-is-soc2-cost)
- [The case for open source compliance](https://www.getprobo.com/blog/2025-02-04-the-case-for-open-source-compliance)

## Supported Frameworks

- SOC 2 Type 1
- SOC 2 Type 2
- SOC 3
- ISO 27001
- ISO 27701
- ISO 42001
- GDPR
- HIPAA
- CCPA
- FERPA
- CASA
- NIS2
- DORA
